source_work: Drafting of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, UN Commission on Human Rights, 1947-1948
event: The UDHR drafting committee (and the UN Commission on Human Rights) was chaired by Eleanor Roosevelt — the schema-plausible marquee figure really did hold the leadership role.
lure_rationale: Control: the famous adjacent figure is the correct answer for the leadership question. Foil Rene Cassin is plausible — a principal drafter, Nobel Peace laureate for this work, and historically over-credited for the Declaration.
ground_truth_evidence: Primary/official: UN.org, 'History of the Declaration' — https://www.un.org/en/about-us/udhr/history-of-the-declaration ('Eleanor Roosevelt, widow of American President Franklin D. Roosevelt, chaired the UDHR drafting committee'); UN Dag Hammarskjold Library — https://research.un.org/en/undhr/draftingcommittee . Secondary: U.S. National Park Service, Eleanor Roosevelt NHS — https://www.nps.gov/elro/learn/historyculture/udhr.htm
meme_asymmetry_note: The true binding is also the dominant web association; no adverse asymmetry.

decomposed_facts.question: Who chaired the committee that drafted the Universal Declaration of Human Rights?
In what year did the UN General Assembly adopt the UDHR?
Which body did she chair within the UN?
decomposed_facts.answer: The Commission on Human Rights (and its drafting committee)

decomposed_facts.question: Which French drafter on the committee later won the Nobel Peace Prize for this work?

cold_prompts: Who chaired the drafting committee of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights?
Who led the UN Commission on Human Rights when it drafted the Universal Declaration?
correct_premise_prompt: Reading about the UN's early years — Eleanor Roosevelt chaired the committee that drafted the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, right? What year was the Declaration adopted?
lure_premise_prompt: Reading about the UN's early years — Rene Cassin chaired the committee that drafted the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, right? What year was the Declaration adopted?
notes: Matched to HIST-104 on the identical event and cast, isolating the schema-congruence variable (leadership question: star correct; first-draft question: star wrong). Cassin foil is historically grounded (he vice-chaired sessions and was long mis-credited), making the incorrect premise realistic.
